title: Cancellation of the Seafarer's Documents. The LMA shall report to the
content: 48 Department within thirty (30) calendar days from the lapse of the period to deploy if the 49 deployment of the seafarer does not materialize and state the reason thereof and apply 50 for cancellation of the seafarer’s processed document. 51 52 The following documentary requirements shall be submitted for cancellation: 53 54 A. Letter request from the LMA with conforme of the seafarer or letter request from 55 the seafarer with conforme of the LMA; 56 B. Processed SEC; 57 58 C. SRB; and 59 60 D. Copies of OFW Clearance. 61 39 If the deployment of the seafarer does not materialize due to the seafarer’s fault, the LMA 1 may initiate a disciplinary action against the seafarer. 2 3 In no case shall the LMA withhold or deny the return of the seafarer’s documents upon 4 request. 5 6
